name: Sweet Ricotta Fritters
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon grated orange zest (colored part of peel)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixer bowl, beat together 1 1/2 cups ladyfinger crumbs, Ricotta cheese, egg yolks, sugar, orange zest, and nutmeg until blended.
2. Refrigerate the mixture covered for at least one hour.
3. While the batter is resting, prepare the Raspberry Sauce.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a 4-quart heavy non-enamel saucepan over medium heat to 325°F using a deep-fry thermometer.
5. Using about 1/3 cup of batter for each fritter, shape the cheese mixture into eight 1-1/2-inch long ovals.
6. In a shallow bowl, lightly beat egg whites until frothy.
7. Dip the ovals in egg white to coat all sides; let excess drip back into the bowl.
8. Roll the ovals in the remaining 3/4 cup ladyfinger crumbs, then place slightly apart on a wire rack to allow the coating to set.
9. Add half the fritters to the oil and fry gently, stirring occasionally, until deep golden brown on all sides, about 2 minutes.
10. Remove with a skimmer or slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
11. Repeat with the remaining fritters.
12. Serve warm with Raspberry Sauce.
